4:T57a,(function(){var PARAM='__pd_reload';var KEY='privatedao-next-asset-recovery:'+(window.location.pathname||'/');function nextAsset(url){return typeof url==='string'&&url.indexOf('/_next/static/')!==-1;}function once(){try{if(window.sessionStorage.getItem(KEY)==='1'){return false;}window.sessionStorage.setItem(KEY,'1');return true;}catch(_){return true;}}function hardReload(){if(!once()){return;}var url=new URL(window.location.href);url.searchParams.set(PARAM,String(Date.now()));window.location.replace(url.toString());}function maybeRecover(value){var message='';if(typeof value==='string'){message=value;}else if(value&&typeof value.message==='string'){message=value.message;}else if(value&&typeof value.reason==='string'){message=value.reason;}if(message.indexOf('ChunkLoadError')!==-1||message.indexOf('Loading CSS chunk')!==-1||message.indexOf('Failed to fetch dynamically imported module')!==-1){hardReload();}}window.addEventListener('error',function(event){var target=event.target;if(target&&nextAsset(target.src||target.href)){hardReload();}},true);window.addEventListener('unhandledrejection',function(event){maybeRecover(event.reason);});if(window.location.search.indexOf(PARAM+'=')!==-1){window.addEventListener('load',function(){var url=new URL(window.location.href);url.searchParams.delete(PARAM);window.history.replaceState(window.history.state,'',url.toString());},{once:true});}})();0:{"P":null,"c":["","documents","governance-runtime-proof",""],"q":"","i":false,"f":[[["",{"children":["documents",{"children":[["slug","governance-runtime-proof","d",null],{"children":["__PAGE__",{}]}]}]},"$undefined","$undefined",16],[["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","link","0",{"rel":"stylesheet","href":"/_next/static/chunks/0lwc_c3gi079n.css","precedence":"next","crossOrigin":"$undefined","nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","link","1",{"rel":"stylesheet","href":"/_next/static/chunks/0ksik4y4kc29~.css","precedence":"next","crossOrigin":"$undefined","nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0r9teku~hyhf~.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-1",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0q43xsqp3a164.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-2",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0n9h-gmzgvi2b.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-3",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/14rr90i2d-.pv.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-4",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0ck-ohyatz.r4.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-5",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/00-csyj9a6t-x.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-6",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0i341nvd7v18~.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-7",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/08b4.saoubi96.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-8",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0w8l2a9eo_~bf.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}]],["$","html",null,{"lang":"en","className":"space_grotesk_d7b50fc5-module__qeW00a__variable hash=window.location.hash||'';if(protocol==='http:'&&host==='privatedao.org'){window.location.replace(target+path+search+hash);return;}if(host==='www.privatedao.org'){window.location.replace(target+path+search+hash);return;}if(host==='x-pact.github.io'&&path.indexOf('/PrivateDAO')===0){var 3d:["$","$1","block-23",{"children":["$","ul","l-292",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-292-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":["This packet separates live web wallet capability from runtime proof capture so the product does not overclaim based on shipped code alone."]}],["$","li","l-292-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":["Repo-script proof exists for the governance core lifecycle, the full Solflare browser cycle is captured on the live web route, and Android Solflare now proves the mobile path through Create DAO, Create Proposal, and Commit Vote."]}],["$","li","l-292-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":["The web wallet lane currently covers Create DAO, Create Proposal, Commit Vote, Reveal Vote, Finalize Proposal, and Execute Proposal for standard, SendSol, and SendToken proposals."]}]]}]}]
